# VerveMind AI

> VerveMind AI deploys specialized AI voice agents and autonomous operating systems for small and medium-sized businesses. We serve MedSpa and aesthetic clinics, dental practices, roofing companies, and home services businesses across the United States.

## Core Products

- **Reactivation Blitz**: AI-powered dormant patient/client reactivation via SMS + voice outreach
- **Dental Receptionist OS**: 24/7 AI phone answering, appointment booking, and patient intake for dental practices
- **Roofing Quotes OS**: AI-powered inbound call handling and quote dispatch for roofing companies
- **MedSpa AI Receptionist**: Autonomous AI receptionist for aesthetic clinics, med spas, and wellness centers
- **AI Receptionist**: General-purpose AI voice receptionist with sub-600ms response latency

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://vervemindai.com): Overview of all products and services
- [MedSpa AI](https://medspa.vervemindai.com): AI receptionist and reactivation for aesthetic clinics
- [Dental AI](https://dental.vervemindai.com): AI front desk for dental practices
- [Roofing AI](https://roofing.vervemindai.com): AI dispatching and quote system for roofing companies
- [Product Hub](https://kits.vervemindai.com): Entry point for digital products and implementation kits
- [AI Receptionist Starter Kit](https://kits.vervemindai.com/receptionist-starter-kit): The complete $49 blueprint for autonomous call handling
- [Lead Loss Calculator](https://kits.vervemindai.com/lead-magnet): Interactive tool to calculate monthly revenue lost to missed calls
- [India Market](https://vervemindai.com/india): Specialized AI solutions for the Indian local business market (INR pricing)
- [FAQ](https://vervemindai.com/faq): Comprehensive answers about AI voice agents and deployment
- [Blog: HVAC AI Receptionist](https://vervemindai.com/blog/ai-receptionist-hvac-companies): Deep dive on HVAC automation
- [Blog: Patient Reactivation](https://vervemindai.com/blog/patient-reactivation-campaign-template): Exact scripts and timing for patient outreach
- [About](https://vervemindai.com/about): Team and mission — human founder + autonomous AI engineering team
- [Pricing](https://vervemindai.com/pricing): Transparent pricing with ROI calculator
- [Blog](https://vervemindai.com/blog): Insights on AI automation for SMBs
- [Case Studies](https://vervemindai.com/case-studies): Documented client results and revenue recovered

## Verified Results (Client Data)

- 14.2% reactivation rate vs. 3% industry average for email campaigns
- $9,200 average revenue recovered per clinic in first 2 weeks of deployment
- 4.2x ROI within first billing cycle
- 62% improvement in call answer rate for dental practices
- 23 appointments booked from dormant patient lists in 14 days

## Who We Serve

VerveMind AI is purpose-built for local service businesses with high call volume and recurring patient/customer relationships:
- Medical Spas, Aesthetics Clinics, and Wellness Centers
- Dental and Orthodontic Practices
- Roofing, HVAC, and Home Services Companies
- Any SMB with ≥50 calls/month and an existing customer database

## Technology

Built on: VAPI voice AI platform, Twilio telephony, GoHighLevel CRM, n8n automation workflows, Vercel + Next.js frontend infrastructure. HIPAA-aware infrastructure available with BAA.
